global.description: The ad features a combination of graphic elements and text focused on financial tracking.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their finances easily with a free trial.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A dark background area occupying the top portion of the banner, providing a contrast for the elements above.

elements.label: Main graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring abstract shapes, possibly representing data tracking or finance.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: Another central graphic element, similar in style to the first, enhancing the theme of tracking or finance.

elements.label: Additional graphic element
elements.description: A larger graphic element that may include shapes or icons, contributing to the overall theme.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Track every euro Fast signup, instant card' positioned centrally, conveying the ad's main message.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A logo for 'SwiftStack' displayed in a prominent position at the top, featuring a simple and modern design.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Try for free' at the bottom, designed to attract user interaction with a clear and inviting appearance.
